name: Xyran
description: A self-aware, locally-integrated personal AI agent for Linux, macOS, and Windows.

changelog.label: v0 — Early Build
changes: Simple single-file chatbot
Basic API-based Q&A only
No memory, no vision, no automation

changelog.label: v0.5 — Shell Automation
changes: Basic shell command execution added
Can open GUI apps via subprocess
Screenshot support added (early version)
Browser launching support added

changelog.label: v1.0 — Full Agentic System (Current)
changes: Full modular architecture with 15+ specialized modules
Dual memory system: FAISS vector index + SQLite relational DB
Real-time screen vision via Wayland Freedesktop XDG Portal
Hybrid LLM routing: Groq (fast) + Gemini (vision/complex) + Ollama (offline fallback)
Smart Intent Gatekeeper — direct handler bypasses LLM for offline tasks
Multi-step command execution engine (run_multi) with timing delays
Real-time weather via wttr.in (no API key needed)
Live news headlines via NewsAPI with category and country filters
Image generation module integrated
System controls: volume, brightness, keyboard backlight, DND mode
Premium terminal UX with ThinkingSpinner (thread-based animated indicator)
Self-awareness system: knows its own creator, history, tech stack, and abilities
Cross-platform support: Linux, macOS, Windows

tech_stack.vector_memory: FAISS (Facebook AI Similarity Search) + SentenceTransformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2 from HuggingFace)
tech_stack.screenshot: D-Bus / Freedesktop XDG Desktop Portal (Wayland native, no xrandr/scrot needed)
tech_stack.browser_automation: Brave Browser / Google Chrome / Firefox via shell commands
tech_stack.web_data: urllib.request — weather via wttr.in, news via NewsAPI v2

features.name: Dual Memory System
features.description: FAISS vector index for semantic recall + SQLite for structured facts. Remembers your preferences, name, projects, tasks across sessions.

features.name: Real-Time Vision
features.description: Takes Wayland-native screenshots and uses Vision LLM to see your screen. Understands visible apps, open files, terminal output, browser tabs.

features.name: Smart Intent Routing
features.description: Adaptive gatekeeper — fast direct handler (no LLM cost/latency) for offline tasks, full AI brain only for complex/reasoning queries.

features.name: System Automation
features.description: Opens/closes GUI apps, browsers, files, editors. Controls volume, screen brightness, keyboard backlight, DND mode.

features.name: Multi-step Command Engine
features.description: Executes chains of 2-10+ actions in sequence with timing delays. Example: open editor → write text → screenshot → show it.

features.name: Live Weather
features.description: Fetches real-time weather via wttr.in. No API key needed. Hinglish formatted report with temp, humidity, wind, visibility.

features.name: News Headlines
features.description: Fetches live headlines from NewsAPI. Supports category filters (tech, sports, business) and country filters.

features.name: Image Generation
features.description: Generates AI images on request via the integrated image generation module.

features.name: Hinglish Personality
features.description: Responds naturally in Hinglish, Hindi, or English — dynamically matching the user's language style.

features.name: Hybrid LLM Routing
features.description: Auto-selects the best model — Gemini for vision/complex tasks, Groq for lightning-fast responses, Ollama for offline fallback.

features.name: Premium Terminal UX
features.description: Animated ThinkingSpinner during API calls, clean output formatting, and no redundant internal logs.

features.name: Self-Awareness
features.description: Knows its own creator, history, tech stack, version, and abilities. Loaded dynamically from xyran_identity.json.
